caption: The video appears to be a segment from a political news program titled "Plus Politics" on PlusTV, focusing on a discussion about Nigeria's political landscape. The host, dressed in a suit and tie, is seated in a studio with a backdrop featuring a world map and the show's logo. On the right side of the screen, there is an inset image of Olusola Oyekanmi, identified as a political analyst based in Lagos, who is participating in the discussion via phone. The headline at the bottom of the screen reads "Nigeria Needs Me - Bola Tinubu," suggesting that the conversation revolves around Bola Tinubu's role or statements regarding Nigeria's current needs. The overall setting indicates a professional and informative broadcast aimed at analyzing political developments in Nigeria.
